announcements.company: The Investment Trust Of India Limited
announcements.headline: Clarification
announcements.body: FORTUNEFIN:The Exchange has sought clarification from Fortune Financial Services (India) Limited with respect to announcement dated 23-Mar-2018, regarding " Fortune Financial Services (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that Fortune Credit Capital Limited a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company has in its Board meeting held on 22nd March, 2018 approved the Scheme of Arrangement between Napean Finvest Private Limited and Fortune Credit Capital Limited for acquiring the NBFC business of Napean Finvest Private Limited.". On basis of above the Company is required to clarify following: 1. Brief details of change in shareholding pattern (if any) of listed entity.2. In case of cash consideration amount or otherwise share entitlement/exchange ratio; 3. Rationale for amalgamation/ merger;4. Area of business of the entity (ies);5. Whether the transaction would fall within related party transactions? If yes, whether the same is done at "arm's length";6. Name of the entity (ies) forming part of the amalgamation/merger, details in brief such as, size, turnover etc.;The response of the Company is awaited.

announcements.company: The Investment Trust Of India Limited
announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: The Investment Trust Of India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Order passed by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) Mumbai Bench for approval of Scheme of Amalgamation of ITI Management Advisors Limited (formerly known as ITI Reinsurance Limited) a wholly owned subsidiary with The Investment Trust of India Limited and their respective shareholders & creditors.'.

announcements.company: The Investment Trust Of India Limited
announcements.headline: Press Release
announcements.body: The Investment Trust Of India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated February 25, 2020, titled "Notice published in newspaper for the final hearing by NCLT in the matter of Amalgmation of ITI Management Advisors Limited with the Company ".

announcements.company: The Investment Trust Of India Limited
announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Fortune Financial Services (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Scheme of Arrangement between Napean Finvest Private Limited (demerged company) and Fortune Credit Capital Limited, (resulting company) a wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company  and their  respective creditors and shareholders  has been approved by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) on 12th July, 2018.According to the Scheme, the lending business of the demerged company  will be transferred to the resulting company as a going concern.'.

announcements.company: The Investment Trust Of India Limited
announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: The Investment Trust Of India Limited has informed the Exchange about Amalgamation of  four Wholly Owned Subsidiaries with Holding Company

announcements.company: The Investment Trust Of India Limited
announcements.headline: Extension of Annual General Meeting
announcements.body: The Investment Trust Of India Limited has informed the Exchange that the Registrar of Companies (ROC) Maharashtra, Mumbai for extension of three months for holding of Annual General Meeting of the members of the Company for the financial year ended March 31, 2018. Accordingly, we will be holding Annual General Meeting of the members of the Company in the last week of December, 2018. The extension is availed by the Company for the purpose of giving effect in the consolidated financial statements for the year ended March 31, 2018 of the order passed by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) Mumbai Bench for demerger of NBFC business of Napean Finvest Private Limited in to Fortune Credit Capital Limited (a wholly owned subsidiary).

announcements.company: The Investment Trust Of India Limited
announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: The Investment Trust Of India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure under regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligation and Disclosure requirements) Regulation 2015'.Considered and approved the proposal for transfer of business of providing fund / asset management services and advisory functions in respect of, and acting as the investment manager of, the AIFs to ITI Asset Management Limited, the wholly owned subsidiary of the Company. This is in continuation to our earlier intimation dated February 13, 2025 and further details about the proposed transfer of business is enclosed in the letter

On basis of above the Company is required to clarify following: 1. Brief details of change in shareholding pattern (if any) of listed entity.2. In case of cash consideration amount or otherwise share entitlement/exchange ratio;��3. Rationale for amalgamation/ merger;4. Area of business of the entity (ies);5. Whether the transaction would fall within related party transactions? If yes, whether the same is done at "arm's length";6. Name of the entity (ies) forming part of the amalgamation/merger, details in brief such as, size, turnover etc.;The response of the Company is attached.

announcements.company: The Investment Trust Of India Limited
announcements.headline: Clarification
announcements.body:
THEINVEST:The Exchange has sought clarification from The Investment Trust Of India Limited with respect to announcement dated 01-Feb-2019, regarding " The Investment Trust Of India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Board meeting held on February 01, 2019.". On basis of above the Company is required to clarify following: 1. Brief details of change in shareholding pattern (if any) of listed entity.
2. In case of cash consideration amount or otherwise share entitlement/exchange ratio;
3. Rationale for amalgamation/ merger;
4. Area of business of the entity (ies);
5. Whether the transaction would fall within related party transactions? If yes, whether the same is done at "arm's length";
6. Name of the entity (ies) forming part of the amalgamation/merger, details in brief such as, size, turnover etc.;
The response of the Company is awaited.

announcements.company: The Investment Trust Of India Limited
announcements.headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.body: Fortune Financial Services (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on January 01, 2018.1. Taken on record the Orders received from  the High Court Judicature at Bombay and from National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) for approval of Scheme of amalgamation of The Investment Trust of India Limited (earlier known as ITI Wealth management Private Limited) with the Company;2. Approval of issue of 2,25,000 1% Redeemable Preference shares of Rs. 100 each fully paid to the equity and preference shareholders of The Investment Trust of India Limited (transferor Company) as per the Scheme;3. Considered to make an application to the Superintendent of Stamps for adjudication of stamp duty payable on giving effect to the amalgamation orders;4. Considered to make an application in the prescribed form to the Registrar of Companies, for availability of name - The Investment Trust of India Limited as per Scheme;

announcements.company: The Investment Trust Of India Limited
announcements.headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.body: Fortune Financial Services (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on January 01, 2018.The Board of Directors in its meeting held on 1st January, 2018, have transacted the following business :1. Taken on record the Orders received from  the High Court Judicature at Bombay and from National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) for approval of Scheme of amalgamation of The Investment Trust of India Limited (earlier known as ITI Wealth management Private Limited) with the Company;2. Approval of issue of 2,25,000 1% Redeemable Preference shares of Rs. 100 each fully paid to the equity and preference shareholders of The Investment Trust of India Limited (transferor Company) as per the Scheme;3. Considered to make an application to the Superintendent of Stamps for adjudication of stamp duty payable on giving effect to the amalgamation orders;4. Considered to make an application in the prescribed form to the Registrar of Companies, for availability of name - The Investment Trust of India Limited as per Scheme;5. Considered to make an application in the prescribed form to the Registrar of Companies, for change in name of the Company from Fortune Financial Services (India) Limited to The Investment Trust of India Limited as per the approved Scheme;6. Other business as per agenda of the meeting.
